info.title: Vidya API
info.description: On-premise College Information & Analytics System. All routes are versioned under /api/v1. The bare /health, /ready and /metrics paths are rewrites of the system module's routes.

sessionAuth.name: vidya_session
sessionAuth.description: Redis-backed session (contract defined in Vidya #1, implemented in Vidya #2). Until then, authenticated routes always return 401.

get.description:
Reports that the process is up and able to serve requests. Also reachable at the conventional alias /health (Next.js rewrite).

**Public route** (no authentication): liveness probes run before any credential exists; exposes no tenant data

Verifies Postgres and Redis are reachable and that the replica is not draining. Alias: /ready.

**Public route** (no authentication): readiness probes run before any credential exists; exposes dependency names and boolean state only

Prometheus text exposition for this replica. Alias: /metrics. Must be network-restricted to the scrape network in production (docs/threat-model.md).

**Public route** (no authentication): scraped by Prometheus without credentials in this phase; restrict at the network layer

post.summary: Log in with username and password
post.description:
Issues a Redis-backed session (HttpOnly cookie). Throttled per user+IP; repeated failures lock the account window. Successful logins audit with the authenticated user as actor; failures are audited by the service.

**Public route** (no authentication): credential establishment — the caller has no session yet

200.description: Session issued; Set-Cookie header carries the session token

401.description: Invalid credentials (uniform for unknown user / wrong password / disabled account)

429.description: Too many failed attempts; retry after the lockout window

post.description: **Requires authentication.** Until Vidya #2 ships the session authenticator, every request receives 401 (deny-by-default gate).

403.description: Access denied by the role/scope policy (problem+json)

get.description: **Requires authentication.** Until Vidya #2 ships the session authenticator, every request receives 401 (deny-by-default gate).

403.description: Access denied by the role/scope policy (problem+json)

post.description:
Requires the current password. Invalidates every session of the user.

**Requires authentication.** Until Vidya #2 ships the session authenticator, every request receives 401 (deny-by-default gate).

403.description: Access denied by the role/scope policy (problem+json)

post.summary: Redeem a one-time reset token and set a new password
post.description:
Tokens are admin-issued (no self-service email flow until the notifications module exists — ADR-0011), single-use, short-TTL. Invalidates every session of the user.

**Public route** (no authentication): the caller has no session — possession of the one-time token is the credential

200.description: Password set; account active; sessions invalidated

401.description: Token invalid, expired or already used

429.description: Too many attempts from this address

post.description:
Creates the account in must_reset status with a temporary password; the user must complete a password reset before first login.

**Requires authentication.** Until Vidya #2 ships the session authenticator, every request receives 401 (deny-by-default gate).

403.description: Access denied by the role/scope policy (problem+json)

get.description: **Requires authentication.** Until Vidya #2 ships the session authenticator, every request receives 401 (deny-by-default gate).

403.description: Admin scope does not cover this college

get.summary: Read a user profile (self, or admin within scope)
get.description:
Record-level access is decided by the scope-check chokepoint (self-access rule or admin support-read).

**Requires authentication.** Until Vidya #2 ships the session authenticator, every request receives 401 (deny-by-default gate).

patch.description: **Requires authentication.** Until Vidya #2 ships the session authenticator, every request receives 401 (deny-by-default gate).

403.description: Access denied by the role/scope policy (problem+json)

put.description:
Revoked roles cascade away their scope grants. Invalidates the user's sessions.

**Requires authentication.** Until Vidya #2 ships the session authenticator, every request receives 401 (deny-by-default gate).

403.description: Access denied by the role/scope policy (problem+json)

post.description:
Org identifiers follow the #3 contract and are recorded verified=false until the OrgDirectory exists. The user must already hold the grant's role. Invalidates the user's sessions.

**Requires authentication.** Until Vidya #2 ships the session authenticator, every request receives 401 (deny-by-default gate).

403.description: Access denied by the role/scope policy (problem+json)

409.description: User does not hold the grant's role

delete.description:
Invalidates the user's sessions.

**Requires authentication.** Until Vidya #2 ships the session authenticator, every request receives 401 (deny-by-default gate).

403.description: Access denied by the role/scope policy (problem+json)

post.description:
Returns the token to the ADMIN for out-of-band delivery. The token itself is never logged or audited — only its issuance.

**Requires authentication.** Until Vidya #2 ships the session authenticator, every request receives 401 (deny-by-default gate).

403.description: Access denied by the role/scope policy (problem+json)
